**PART 3 вЂ” RENDERED BOARD (`ui-standards.html`):** self-contained pure renderer (inline `MANIFEST` = the single edit point; opens on `file://` with **no drag-drop**, no build step вЂ” David double-clicks and SEES it), matching status.html's visual language. Renders control Г— standard вњ… meets / рџџЎ partial / рџ”ґ missing. **Seeded HONESTLY: 13 вњ… / 1 рџџЎ / 2 рџ”ґ** вЂ” grid G1вЂ“G8 вњ…, field F1вЂ“F3 вњ…, modal M1 (centered) + M2 (validation) вњ…, **M4 backdrop-behavior рџџЎ, M3 escape-to-close рџ”ґ, M5 focus-trap рџ”ґ** = the next modal rung, KNOWN and visible, not silently claimed done (Surface Honesty at the board level).

**SYSTEM-MANAGED FIELD REGISTRY (report for David to confirm вЂ” unchanged from #104, now documented in the spec):** locked set = `created_at` (Added) В· `updated_at` (Last touched) В· `receipt_id` (Receipt) В· `source` (Source) В· `qb_customer_id` (QuickBooks) В· `id` (ID) В· `business_id` (Business). Per grid: inventory locks created_at/updated_at/receipt_id; assets created_at; customers source/qb_customer_id/created_at. **`customers.price_tier` flagged NOT locked** (business data, future inline-edit candidate вЂ” a decision, not an omission). `cost_confidence`/`estimated_value_confidence` excluded (editable overrides).

**CLAUDE.md В§6 rule 15 (binding umbrella):** every control is measured against the spec; r13 (system-field lock) + r14 (grid scroll) are clauses OF it; the spec adds the modal standard (M1вЂ“M5); a control below the bar is a KNOWN amber/red board row, reconciled or explicitly deferred, never silent; fix in the SHARED control so consumers inherit. **This SUPERSEDES the ad-hoc modal-centering / scroll-defect findings with ONE standard + a visible board.**

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David, after merge в†’ Vercel READY):** `/inventory` scrolls horizontally WITHOUT hunting for the scrollbar (header + Name column pinned) в†’ a system field shows a clickable рџ”’ + explanation в†’ the residual modals (operating-costs / projects-manager / inventory-count add-sheets + the discovery conflict dialog) appear CENTERED в†’ open `ui-standards.html` (double-click) в†’ the board shows control-vs-standard status at a glance.

### 2026-07-09 вЂ” THUNDER DATASHEET platform standards: system-managed-field lock-with-explanation (single registry) + horizontal-scroll (bounded box + sticky header + frozen identifier column) вЂ” ONE shared control fixes ALL 3 grids; BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; ZERO schema/api-fn/migration

**Type:** App code вЂ” 1 NEW registry (`packages/cultivar-os/src/components/datasheet/systemManagedFields.ts`) + the shared `components/datasheet/DataSheet.tsx` engine + 3 one-line consumer edits (BusinessInventory / BusinessAssets / Customers each mark their identifier column `frozen`). **NO schema, NO migration, NO new `api/` file** (12/12 held). `[TRACE:datasheet]` added (one emit per grid mount: title + column/frozen/system-managed counts), ON. `npm run verify` **exit 0 zero NET-NEW** (tsc 6 / eslint 249 / knip 10В·14В·15 == baseline); `build:cultivar` clean (8.1s). **Committed + pushed this close-out** (standing rule). STORY: platform UI-conventions (item 5) вЂ” TWO cross-cutting DataSheet standards в†’ **CLAUDE.md В§6 rules 13 + 14**.

**THE TWO PLATFORM STANDARDS (both in the ONE shared grid control в†’ inventory/assets/customers inherit at once):**
- **STANDARD 1 вЂ” system-managed fields display LOCKED-WITH-EXPLANATION (В§6 r13, Surface-Honesty for editability).** A system-write-only field (timestamps `created_at`/`updated_at`, provenance `receipt_id`/`source`/`qb_customer_id`, identity `id`/`business_id`) renders a clickable рџ”’ in its column header в†’ popover "System-managed вЂ” not editable" + what sets it + why. So a non-editable field reads as managed-with-a-reason, never a silent-grey HIDDEN edit. **Single canonical registry** `systemManagedFields.ts` (`SYSTEM_MANAGED_FIELDS` internal + `lockInfoFor()` API) = the SOLE source; the grid reads it and matches by column key (keys == DB field names across all 3 configs, so ONE flat registry covers all three). Popover is `position:fixed` (escapes the scroll box's clip). **DELIBERATELY EXCLUDED:** `cost_confidence` / `estimated_value_confidence` вЂ” derived-by-default BUT manually overridable on the reconcile grids (genuinely editable there) в†’ NOT auto-locked (a read-only surface can force `systemManaged:true`). Per-column escape hatches: `systemManaged:false` force-unlock, `systemManaged:true`+`lockReason` force-lock.
- **STANDARD 2 вЂ” horizontal scroll ALWAYS REACHABLE (В§6 r14).** The grid now renders in a **bounded scroll box** (`overflow:auto` + `maxHeight:calc(100vh-280px)`) so BOTH scrollbars live on the box, not the page вЂ” the h-scrollbar sits at the bottom of the viewport-bounded box, reachable WITHOUT scrolling past all 111 rows (the reported defect). Paired with a **sticky header** (`position:sticky;top:0` + box-shadow underline that survives `border-collapse` on scroll) and a **frozen identifier column** (leading `frozen:true` run pins `position:sticky;left:вЂ¦` with cumulative offsets; last frozen col gets a right-edge shadow; frozen `<td>` bg respects the dup-row highlight). Consumers: inventory freezes `flag`(frozenWidth 34)+`name`, assets freezes `name`, customers freezes `first_name`.

**REGISTRY вЂ” system-managed fields per table (reported for David to confirm the set):**
- **business_inventory** (`/inventory`): рџ”’ `created_at` (Added), `updated_at` (Last touched), `receipt_id` (Receipt). Excluded: `cost_confidence` (editable override вЂ” stays unlocked).
- **cost_objects / assets** (`/assets`): рџ”’ `created_at` (Added). Excluded: `cost_confidence` / `estimated_value_confidence` (editable overrides). (`updated_at`/`id`/`business_id` in registry but not shown as columns.)
- **customers** (`/customers`): рџ”’ `source` (Source), `qb_customer_id` (QuickBooks), `created_at` (Added). **FLAGGED (not locked, for David):** `price_tier` is display-only in the grid but is BUSINESS data (not system-written) вЂ” a candidate for future inline-edit, NOT a system lock. Left unlocked deliberately.

**CONSTRAINTS HELD:** ONE shared control (not per-consumer); AC-3 unchanged; 12/12 api-fn; no migration. All 3 consumers build + typecheck clean (frozen columns + auto-locks). Registry is the single source for the lock rule. Two non-grid `sheetStyles` importers (CustomerEditModal/CustomerFields) untouched. Possible relation to the 2026-07-09 forms/modals compliance-audit: these are NET-NEW platform standards (system-field honesty + grid-scroll), orthogonal to that audit's centering/validation rows вЂ” not a row it closes, a new axis.

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David, after merge в†’ Vercel READY):** on `/inventory` вЂ” the grid scrolls horizontally WITHOUT scrolling to the bottom (the header row + the Name column stay pinned as you scroll right/down) в†’ a system field (Last touched / Added / Receipt) shows a рџ”’ в†’ click it в†’ popover explains "system-managed, not editable" + what sets it в†’ editable fields (qty, sell price, name) still edit inline в†’ confirm the same on `/assets` (Added locked, Name frozen) and `/customers` (Source + QuickBooks + Added locked, First frozen). `[TRACE:datasheet]` stays ON until owner-proven.

### 2026-07-09 вЂ” THUNDER ADD INVENTORY modal: required `sell_price` (D-35 CRUD hole вЂ” nothing born unsellable) + unit_cost editable (derives cost_confidence) + centered modal (convention A) вЂ” BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; TWO files, ZERO schema/api-fn

**Type:** App code вЂ” TWO files (`packages/cultivar-os/src/pages/BusinessInventory.tsx` + `packages/cultivar-os/src/components/datasheet/DataSheet.tsx`). **NO schema, NO migration** (`sell_price`/`unit_cost`/`cost_confidence` all EXIST per D-35/prior work), **NO new `api/` file** (12/12 held). `[TRACE:INVENTORY]` added (add-insert logs sell_price + cost_confidence + blocked saves), ON. `[TRACE:invsheet]`/`[TRACE:PRICE]` unchanged. `npm run verify` **exit 0 zero NET-NEW** (tsc 6 / eslint 249 / knip 10В·14В·15 == baseline); `build:cultivar` clean (7.2s). **Committed + pushed this close-out** (standing rule). STORY: platform-validation ## NEEDED (second reference application, beyond FIX 5) + board 5.1.

**THE DEFECT (owner-surfaced, THREE issues on the Add Inventory create form):** (1) **the CRUD hole** вЂ” the create form NEVER set `sell_price`, so every new line was born with `null` sell_price в†’ **unsellable** (hits the checkout $0-refusal) в†’ forced a create-then-edit two-step (owner hit this today adding a Live Oak). (2) `unit_cost` was `disabled` when `cost_confidence === 'UNKNOWN'` (the default) вЂ” a **dead affordance**, no entry path to type a cost. (3) the modal was a bottom-sheet (off-center вЂ” David flagged).

**FIX 1 вЂ” required `sell_price` (the important bug):** added a **mandatory** Sell Price field. Blank / non-numeric / в‰¤ $0 в†’ BLOCK + red-border + inline message (new `validateInventoryForm` + local `errBorder`/`FieldError`/`RED` вЂ” the **FIX 5 pattern copied, not forked**: per the FIX 5 handoff "the shape other forms copy"; rule-of-three not yet hit so a second copy is sanctioned). sell_price is INDEPENDENT of cost/confidence вЂ” it's what the business charges. **Margin-aware (structure only, NOT built):** the field wrapper is `position:relative` with an empty `marginSignalStyle` slot so the future advisory indicator (background traffic-light + drill-in icon, `docs/concepts/margin-aware-pricing-intelligence.md`) can attach WITHOUT restructuring вЂ” the background is NOT hardcoded into a wall. NO margin math this pass.

**FIX 2 вЂ” `unit_cost` editable + `cost_confidence` DERIVED:** removed the manual Cost Confidence picker from the create form; `unit_cost` is now freely editable (optional). RULE: unit_cost typed в†’ `cost_confidence = CONFIRMED`; blank в†’ `UNKNOWN`. Derived from presence, NOT picked, and NO relationship to sell_price. (The grid's inline confidence override is untouched вЂ” reconcile surface, separate.)

**FIX 3 вЂ” centered modal (shared lever):** flipped the shared `sheetStyles.modal` `alignItems: 'flex-end'` в†’ `'center'` (+ padding, sheet radius `16px16px00`в†’`16`, maxHeight `92vh`в†’`85vh`). This is the SINGLE lever behind the three datasheet-add sheets в†’ **centers Add Inventory + Add Customer + Add Asset at once** (compliance-audit rows #3/#5/#6 вЂ” **convention A "always center" adopted for the datasheet-add camp**). Own-copy bottom-sheets (#7 OperatingCosts, #8 ProjectsManager, #9 InventoryCount) remain the residual retrofit backlog.

**CONSTRAINTS HELD:** AC-3 (business-scoped write); В§6 rule 8 (FIX 5 validation shape copied per its own "other forms copy" framing, not drifted); 12/12 api-fn; D-9 (unit_cost blank в†’ honest UNKNOWN, never $0; sell_price required > $0 rather than a downstream silent $0-refusal). Margin signal structure-only (empty slot).

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David, after merge в†’ Vercel READY):** add a new inventory line в†’ **sell_price is required** (blank blocks with a VISIBLE message, not a silent greyed button) в†’ enter sell_price + leave cost blank в†’ **SAVES + is immediately SELLABLE** (no $0-refusal, no create-then-edit two-step) в†’ enter a unit_cost в†’ cost_confidence flips CONFIRMED в†’ the modal is **centered** (and confirm Add Customer / Add Asset are centered too). `[TRACE:INVENTORY]` stays ON until owner-proven.

### 2026-07-09 вЂ” THUNDER FIX 5: required-field validation in the Settings service editor (no silent save) + combined forms/modals compliance audit вЂ” the REFERENCE implementation of the cross-cutting platform validation rule; BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; ONE file, ZERO schema/api-fn

**Type:** App code вЂ” ONE file `packages/shared/src/pages/Settings.tsx` + ONE read-only audit doc + ONE new `user_stories.md` story. **NO schema, NO migration, NO new `api/` file** (12/12 held). `[TRACE:SERVICE]` extended (logs blocked saves), stays ON. `npm run verify` **exit 0 zero NET-NEW** (tsc/eslint/knip == baseline); `build:cultivar` clean. **Committed + pushed `d5755a9`** (standing commit-and-push rule). STORY: NEW cross-cutting **platform-validation ## NEEDED** ("No form ever fails silently") вЂ” this build is its **reference implementation**.

**THE DEFECT (owner-surfaced):** saving a service with a blank Price failed **SILENTLY** вЂ” the "Add Service" button was `disabled` on any empty required field, so a blank Price greyed it out with NO explanation (and a $0/free service needs `0` typed вЂ” **blank в‰  free**, D-9). Same silent class on the Edit form (`saveEdit` early-returned on `isNaN(price)` with no feedback).

**THE FIX (both New Service AND Edit):** new module-level **`validateServiceForm`** (name В· price [0 valid, only blank/NaN rejected] В· category В· transport_mode when transport) runs on save-attempt в†’ if non-empty, BLOCK the save, set the error map, red-border each offending field (**`errBorder`**), and show an inline message (**`FieldError`**, e.g. "Price is required вЂ” enter 0 for a free service"). The Add button is now clickable (removed the empty-field `disabled`) so a click SURFACES the reason instead of a silent greyed button. Errors clear on `startEdit`/cancel/successful validate. `[TRACE:SERVICE]` logs a blocked save + missing fields. **Reuses the shared `RED`** (no color dup, В§6 r8). `validateServiceForm`/`errBorder`/`FieldError` are the shape other forms copy.

**COMBINED FORMS + MODALS AUDIT (read-only inventory вЂ” the retrofit backlog for TWO rules):** `docs/decisions/2026-07-09-forms-and-modals-compliance-audit.md` rates **16 forms/modals on BOTH axes** вЂ” required-field VALIDATION (block+message / silent / allows-through) AND modal CENTERING (centered / bottom-sheet). Findings: most surfaces already вњ… block+message; **3 validation gaps** (OnboardingWizard nursery step = disabled-Continue-no-message [the exact defect class FIX 5 fixed], CustomerEditModal = silent snap-back, + ProjectsManager/ReceiptKeeper to confirm); **6 bottom-sheet modals** (`alignItems:'flex-end'`) вЂ” the shared **`DataSheet sheetStyles.modal`** is the SINGLE lever for 3 of them (Add Customer/Inventory/Asset). **David's decision (the "why not always centered" answer):** convention **A** (always center в†’ retrofit the 6) or **B** (center-for-decisions, bottom-sheet-for-list-adds в†’ document the split, вљ пёЏ rows become вњ…-by-design). Read-only вЂ” no other surface changed this pass; each row is a board item. **Flagged aside** (separate item): Add Inventory `unit_cost` is `disabled` when confidence=UNKNOWN (a dead affordance David flagged).

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David):** in the Settings service editor вЂ” save a service with a blank Price в†’ the field red-borders + "Price is required вЂ” enter 0 for a free service" shows (NOT a silent greyed button) в†’ enter `0` в†’ it saves as a free service; same on the Edit form.

### 2026-07-09 вЂ” THUNDER DROP `order_items.plant_id` (AC-1 de-noun of the shared order spine, D-36): the ROOT-CAUSE fix for the recurring "PLANTS (0)" bug вЂ” `business_inventory_id` is the sole line anchor + 6 readers repointed вЂ” BUILDER-COMPLETE, migration GATED, owner-proof owed; ZERO new api-fn, ONE gated migration

**Type:** App code вЂ” `api/orders/submit.ts` (stopped WRITING plant_id + dropped it from every SELECT/type + vocab clean) + 6 specimen readers (`lib/orderItemName.ts`, `pages/OrderDetail.tsx`, `pages/DemoQBInvoice.tsx`, `api/qbo/invoice/cultivar.ts`, `pages/DeliveryRoute.tsx`, `pages/Orders.tsx` roster вЂ” all repointed to `business_inventory_id`, `cultivar_plants` embed removed) + ONE GATED migration `20260709_drop_order_items_plant_id.sql` (David applies as postgres). **NO new api/ file** (12/12 held). `[TRACE:*]` ON. `npm run verify` **exit 0 zero NET-NEW** (tsc 6 / eslint 249 / knip 10В·14В·15 == baseline); `build:cultivar` clean (7.5s); `submit.ts` + `cultivar.ts` esbuild-bundle OK. **UNCOMMITTED at build time вЂ” committed + pushed in this close-out** (standing rule). STORY MAPS-TO **#231** (order display root cause). Built to the AC-1 audit (`docs/decisions/2026-07-09-plant-references-ac1-audit.md` R4/R5 вЂ” bucket-A #1+#2), not re-reconned. Decision **D-36**.

**THE FIX (AC-1 root cause):** `order_items.plant_id` (FKв†’`cultivar_plants`) was a **Cultivar vertical noun bolted onto the SHARED order spine** вЂ” the AC-1 violation that caused the recurring "PLANTS (0)" / "Unknown plant" / "undefined" order-display bug (#231). David's call: **DROP it** (R5 option a, mirrors the shipped `social_drafts.plant_id` DROP). Proven vestigial вЂ” every live line writes `business_inventory_id` with `plant_id` NULL. After this, `business_inventory_id` is the **sole** line anchor (D-34 вЂ” the LOT is the SKU); the lot's name IS the variety name, so lines resolve via the shared `orderItemName` resolver (not forked).

**BUILT (safe sequence, deploy-window-safe):** (STEP 1) confirmed vestigial from the audit's live-data finding (all `plant_id` NULL). Could NOT re-query live (no local Supabase creds вЂ” the migration carries a PRE-FLIGHT `count(*) WHERE plant_id IS NOT NULL` for David to confirm 0 before applying). (STEP 2) `submit.ts` вЂ” the specimen write branch `row.plant_id = rl.plant.id` в†’ **every line writes `business_inventory_id = rl.stockLineId ?? rl.plant.inventory_id`** (a specimen anchors to its lot); `resolveItemForServer` dropped its now-dead `plant_id` branch + param; 3 update/delete/status SELECTs dropped `plant_id`; vocab cleaned (`plantCount`в†’`itemCount`, `plantSubtotal`в†’**`linesSubtotal`** [avoided collision with the imported `lineSubtotal` fn], local `plantName`в†’`itemName`; the cultivar notification `plantName:` KEY kept вЂ” bucket-B template contract; the specimen create-lane `cultivar_plants` PRICE read kept вЂ” reads the specimen table by id, NOT order_items.plant_id). (STEP 3) the 6 readers repointed to `business_inventory_id`-first + `cultivar_plants` embed removed from each SELECT (the FK is gone в†’ PostgREST can no longer join it). (STEP 4) GATED migration `20260709` вЂ” `DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS plant_id` + PRE-FLIGHT + verify (A)-(D).

**CONSTRAINTS HELD:** money/qty/subtotal/reservation/leakage logic UNTOUCHED вЂ” only the line's NAME anchor changed (money-safety). AC-1 (spine loses the vertical noun) В· AC-3 (business-scoped unchanged) В· В§6 rule 8 (ONE resolver reused). **SCOPE FENCE:** ONLY bucket-A #1 (`plant_id`) + #2 (submit vocab) вЂ” NOT `price_unit` (bucket-A #3, HELD), NOT the QR util (bucket-A #5, HELD), NOT any bucket-B cultivar code.

**DEPLOY-WINDOW SAFETY:** the shipping code no longer references `order_items.plant_id` BEFORE the drop в†’ the column is unread whether the migration applies before or after deploy. **SAFE ORDER:** deploy code first (Vercel READY), THEN David applies the DROP (an OLD bundle asking for `plant_id` post-drop would 42703; the new bundle never asks).

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David, after code deploys в†’ apply `20260709` as postgres в†’ PRE-FLIGHT count 0 в†’ verify A-D):** open order `0d1e4110` в†’ **PLANTS shows the trees** (Shoal Creek Vitex Г—4 + Live Oak Г—2, name/qty/price вЂ” NOT "PLANTS (0)"); every order's detail + roster + QB preview + real QB invoice + delivery card names plants via `business_inventory_id`; no order shows "Unknown"/"undefined"/"(0)" anywhere. The recurring bug is permanently closed. **Still open on the board (per David):** bucket-A #3 (`price_unit`), #4 (dashboard `plant_count`), #5 (QR util), #6 (`populate.ts`).

### 2026-07-08 вЂ” THUNDER RECEIPT/QB/LEAKAGE + tile-2.1 HARDCODED SWEEP: 5 fixes in one pass в†’ QR Checkout tile earns GREEN (BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; ONE gated leakage migration, ZERO new api-fn)

**Type:** App code вЂ” 9 files touched (DemoQBInvoice, Confirmation, CartReview, CustomerCapture, PlantProfile, AddOns, types/order, useSubmitOrder, submit.ts, qbo/invoice/cultivar.ts, shared/auth/callerPermission) + ONE GATED migration `20260708_service_override_leakage.sql` (David applies as postgres). **NO new `api/` file** (override rides `submit.ts` create path; QB preview reads client-side; 12/12 held). `[TRACE:QBO]`/`[TRACE:PRICE]`/`[TRACE:LEAKAGE]`/`[TRACE:CART]` ON. `npm run verify` **exit 0 zero NET-NEW** (tsc 6 / eslint 249 / knip 10В·14В·15 == baseline); `build:cultivar` clean (2341 modules); `submit.ts`+`cultivar.ts` esbuild-bundle OK. **UNCOMMITTED at build time вЂ” committed + pushed in this close-out** (standing rule). STORY MAPS-TO **2.1** (purchase-workflow #231 В§6 receipt/QB + a leakage-on-override sub-story). Built to the recon (`docs/decisions/2026-07-08-receipt-qb-leakage-recon.md`) + HARDCODED-REGISTER; not re-reconned.

**THE 5 FIXES (fix-all-in-one-pass вЂ” shared blast radius, touch-once-test-once):**
- **FIX 1 (H1) вЂ” QB PREVIEW from the real order:** `DemoQBInvoice.tsx` rebuilt as an order-backed `QBInvoicePreview` вЂ” reads `orderId` (already passed by Confirmation), fetches the REAL `order_items` (D-34 dual anchor via the shared `orderItemName.ts`, 3rd reuse) + `order_service_selections в†’ service_offerings(name)` + `customers` + the real `businesses` row, renders them in the QB chrome. Killed the 3 fixed fake lines (Vitex/netting/compost), the hardcoded LAWNS identity, and the **retired "Layna" contact**. Display-only вЂ” real integration untouched. (`export { QBInvoicePreview as DemoQBInvoice }` вЂ” router import unchanged.)
- **FIX 2 (H3/H6) вЂ” receipt itemizes services by REAL name:** `Confirmation.tsx` transport badge = `{businessName} вЂ” {transportName}` (from nav state, not the hardcoded "LAWNS handling delivery/install"); the Order-detail block now lists each service line by its real `service_offerings.name` + amount. `CartReview` passes `serviceLines`/`transportName`/`businessName` through nav state (one source, no recompute drift; owner overrides included). `CHOICE_META` stays radio-only (verified: only `TransportToggle` consumes it).
- **FIX 3 (R3.4) вЂ” real QB push DUAL ANCHOR:** `api/qbo/invoice/cultivar.ts` joined `cultivar_plants(*)` ONLY в†’ a stock-line/scan order (plant_id null, PRIMARY path) printed "undefined вЂ” undefined" on Lauren's REAL invoice. Now joins `business_inventory(name,size,sku)` too + names via the shared `orderItemName`; `[TRACE:QBO]` logs the anchor per line. Names only вЂ” amounts/tax untouched.
- **FIX 4 вЂ” EDITABLE PRICE + ATTRIBUTED LEAKAGE (mirrors Ignition):** GATED migration adds `is_manual_override`/`original_price`/`price_leakage`/`override_by`/`override_reason` to `order_service_selections` (+`order_items`, schema-ready; UI wires SERVICES this pass). `CartReview` ServiceRow gains an owner/manager-gated (`isOwner || can('manage_orders')`) price-override editor with a **reason field** (improves on Ignition, which lacks one); leakage = baseline в€’ entered, surfaced inline. `submit.ts` honors the override ONLY on a **token-verified** owner/manager path (`callerCanManageOrders` + new `resolveCallerUid` for attribution); the public/anon path stays server-authoritative + tamper-defended (overrides ignored, `[TRACE:PRICE]` logs the refusal). `useSubmitOrder` attaches the Bearer token when a session exists. Selection insert is deploy-window-safe (writes override cols; on 42703/PGRST204 retries WITHOUT them). A $350 planting give is recorded as attributed leakage (amount + baseline + actor + order + reason) вЂ” surfaced, not blocked.
- **FIX 5 (H2/H4/H5/H7/H8) вЂ” SWEEP the remaining tile-2.1 literals to data/generic:** plant-profile footer в†’ `businesses` row from context (omitted, not faked, under anon RLS); opt-in copy в†’ `business.name`; `types/order.ts` label в†’ generic 'Staff transport'; netting `?? 10` в†’ `?? 0` (real offering price; also `submit.ts:260`); city/zip placeholders в†’ 'City'/'ZIP'.

**REGISTER: ALL 8 tile-2.1 items CLEARED** (`HARDCODED-REGISTER.md` updated) в†’ **2.1 Cart / QR Checkout restored рџџЎв†’рџџў** (no open debt). Only H9 (front-door signup example) remains open and drops no green tile.

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David, after leakage migration applied в†’ merge в†’ Vercel READY):** (1) QB sandbox preview shows the REAL order's lines + real business identity (no Vitex/netting/compost, no Layna); (2) receipt itemizes services by real name (e.g. "We deliver and plant"); (3) a stock-line order's REAL QB invoice names the plant correctly (no "undefined"); (4) owner overrides planting 6Г—$225в†’$1000 в†’ total updates + a leakage row is written (actor+amount+reason), a non-owner/anon session cannot (server ignores + `[TRACE:PRICE]` refusal); (5) footer + opt-in + netting price all resolve from data (no LAWNS/$10/Leander literals). `[TRACE:*]` stay ON until owner-proven. **Open decision (surfaced):** the plant-profile footer is empty for a true-anon customer scan (no `businesses` read under RLS) вЂ” honest, but if a public footer is wanted it needs an anon-safe business-identity read (separate RLS decision).

### 2026-07-08 вЂ” THUNDER #100 FOLLOW-UP: order-detail line-items showed "PLANTS (0)" вЂ” dedicated top-level order_items fetch (completes the #100 drill-in) вЂ” BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; ZERO new api-fn, ZERO schema

**Type:** App code вЂ” ONE file `packages/cultivar-os/src/pages/OrderDetail.tsx`. **NO schema, NO migration, NO new `api/` file.** `[TRACE:ROSTER]` ON. `npm run verify` **exit 0 zero NET-NEW** (tsc 6 / eslint 249 / knip 10В·14В·15 == baseline); `build:cultivar` clean. **UNCOMMITTED at build time вЂ” committed + pushed in this close-out** (standing rule). Completes the #100 roster drill-in (`84d7eff`): the drill-in now renders plant lines.

**SYMPTOM (owner-prove, David):** the `/orders/:id` detail showed **"PLANTS (0)"** / `[TRACE:ROSTER] lines:0` even though the stored `subtotal` INCLUDED plant cost (order `108c6993`: subtotal $473, services $225 в†’ ~$248 of plants present in money but 0 lines returned). Same anchor-class family as Part A "Unknown plant," one layer deeper вЂ” the dual-anchor resolver reached the roster card but the detail's line-item FETCH returned zero rows.

**CAUSE (diagnosed from code + the diagnostic signal вЂ” could NOT read live rows, no local Supabase creds, Vercel-only):** the detail loaded `order_items` as a **nested embed under a `.maybeSingle()` orders query alongside a sibling `order_service_selections` embed**. The decisive signal: in the SAME successful query, `order_service_selections` (services) returned rows while the sibling `order_items` embed returned `[]` в†’ the failure is the nested `order_items` embed specifically (an orders-level RLS/error would have emptied BOTH children). NOT a `plant_id` filter, NOT `!inner` in our code, NOT missing rows (the roster reads `order_items` via a simpler nested embed and returns rows вЂ” Part A names show вЂ” so `order_items` IS client-readable live). Structural contributor: `order_items`' migration-defined RLS is still `nursery_id`-based ([20260528](supabase/migrations/20260528_per_tenant_rls_isolation.sql)) vs `order_service_selections`' `business_id`-based policy ([20260529](supabase/migrations/20260529_businesses_f_service_offerings.sql)) вЂ” matches the services-show/plants-empty asymmetry вЂ” but since the roster proves `order_items` is readable live (drift-fixed, tech-debt #39), the fix is a query fix, not a migration.

**FIX:** `order_items` is now fetched in its **OWN top-level query** (`ITEM_COLS`), decoupled from the orders embed вЂ” returns ALL lines regardless of D-34 anchor (stock-line via `business_inventory_id` / specimen via `plant_id`), no inner-join, no `plant_id` filter, cannot be dropped by a parent-embed interaction. Runs AFTER the orders query verified `.eq('business_id', businessId)` (AC-3 вЂ” scoped by `order_id` on an order already confirmed to belong to the business). Names still resolved via the SAME Part-A `orderItemName.ts` dual-anchor resolver (not forked). `[TRACE:ROSTER]` now logs `lines`, per-line `anchors`, `plantLinesTotal` + `servicesTotal` + `storedSubtotal` + a `reconciles` boolean.

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David, after merge в†’ Vercel READY):** open order `108c6993` в†’ **PLANTS shows the actual trees** (name + qty + price, NOT "PLANTS (0)") в†’ `[TRACE:ROSTER]` shows `lines:>0` and `reconciles:true` (plant lines ~$248 + services $225 == subtotal $473); every order's detail shows its plants. `[TRACE:ROSTER]` stays ON until owner-proven.

### 2026-07-08 вЂ” THUNDER ORDER ROSTER CRUD + "Unknown plant" fix (as-built В§7 gaps): dual-anchor names + `/orders/:id` drill-in + owner/manager edit/delete/status (server-recompute + re-reservation) вЂ” BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; ZERO new api-fn (12/12), ZERO schema

**Type:** App code вЂ” 3 NEW files (`lib/orderItemName.ts`, `lib/orderStatus.ts`, `pages/OrderDetail.tsx`) + `pages/Orders.tsx` + `api/orders/submit.ts` (action dispatch) + `router.tsx` + 1 NEW shared server-gate module (`packages/shared/src/auth/callerPermission.ts`, `callerHoldsPermission` MOVED here from `ingest.ts` + re-exported; NEW `callerIsBusinessOwner`) + `roles.ts`/`seed-role-floor.mjs` (`manage_orders` perm) + `verify-universals.mjs` (capR `/orders/:id` exception). **NO schema, NO migration, NO new `api/` file** (edit/delete/status ride `submit.ts` via an `action` param вЂ” 12/12 held). `[TRACE:ROSTER]` ON. `npm run verify` **exit 0 zero NET-NEW** вЂ” baseline IMPROVED (eslint 250в†’**249**, fixed a pre-existing Orders floating-promise; re-baselined + locked); tsc 6 / knip 10В·14В·15 == baseline; `build:cultivar` clean 6.8s; `submit.ts` + `ingest.ts` esbuild-bundle OK. **UNCOMMITTED вЂ” David commits** (harness rule). STORY MAPS-TO **2.1** (in-store purchase workflow, `user_stories.md` #231 roster sub-stories вЂ” marked built). Behavior spec: as-built recon `docs/decisions/2026-07-08-as-built-purchase-workflow.md` В§7.

**LOAD-BEARING FACTS (verify-first, in code):** `orders` RLS is **owner-only SELECT** (`orders_business_owner`, `20260529_businesses_d_update_rls.sql`); **ALL order writes go through the service-key `submit.ts`** (no anon INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE policy). вџ№ edit/delete/status MUST ride `submit.ts` with a token gate + server recompute (client RLS writes impossible + can't recompute) вЂ” exactly the prompt's ask. `has_permission(business_id,perm)` is a plain jsonb-contains on the caller's member row (no owner short-circuit) в†’ the owner is gated by **owner_id**, not a member perm.

**PART A вЂ” "Unknown plant" FIXED (В§7 significant gap):** the roster joined `order_items в†’ cultivar_plants` via `plant_id`, but every scan/stock-line order writes `business_inventory_id` with `plant_id null` в†’ "Unknown plant". NEW pure `lib/orderItemName.ts` (`orderItemName`/`orderItemTag`/`orderItemAnchor`) resolves by the **D-34 dual anchor** вЂ” specimen (`cultivar_plants.common_name/species`) WINS, else stock-line (`business_inventory.name`). `Orders.tsx` embed extended (`business_inventory ( name, size, sku )`), reused on the roster + drill-in (one definition, В§6 r8). `[TRACE:ROSTER]` logs the anchor per order.

**PART B вЂ” full order CRUD (owner/manager; staff read-only, server-enforced):**
- **Permission (three-lens decision):** NEW `manage_orders` (owner+manager) in cultivar `roles.ts` + mirrored in `seed-role-floor.mjs` (drift = wall leak). **Server gate = owner (`businesses.owner_id`) OR `has_permission('manage_orders')`** вЂ” the owner path works TODAY with zero data backfill (owner-prove is owner-vs-staff); managers pick it up once their role is re-applied (honest debt, fails closed/safe). Frontend gate = `isOwner || can('manage_orders')`.
- **READ drill-in `pages/OrderDetail.tsx` (`/orders/:id`, under the existing `qr_checkout` route):** ALL line items (dual-anchor names, per-line price), ALL services (`order_service_selections` вЂ” transport/planting/netting/addons, **written by submit but never displayed until now**), customer, delivery date, transport note, status, full totals. delivery_date is gated (`20260708`) в†’ the select tries WITH it, retries WITHOUT on 42703/PGRST204.
- **UPDATE (`submit.ts` action=update):** owner/manager edit line quantities + delivery date + remove lines. **Server-recomputes** (re-reads `business_inventory.sell_price` per line вЂ” tamper defense; $0/NULL refusal per line; re-nets each service over the NEW plant count via the SAME `nettedQuantity`/`lineSubtotal`; recomputes tax/total/addons/leakage). **RE-RESERVES inventory** (release ALL old lots в†’ 'available', reserve KEPT lots в†’ 'reserved'; removed lines' lots go free). Empty result (all lines removed) в†’ 400 (delete instead). **QB staleness SURFACED** вЂ” response `qbStale:true` + a UI banner "invoice may be out of date вЂ” re-sync in QuickBooks" (never a silent mismatch; auto re-sync deferred в†’ R-QBSTALE).
- **DELETE (action=delete):** release the order's reservations в†’ 'available', then delete `order_compliance_records`/`order_service_selections`/`order_items`/`orders` (explicit, no cascade reliance). Confirm-before-delete in UI.
- **STATUS (action=status):** surface the `status` field (fetched but never shown) + move off `pending`. Minimal lifecycle `pendingв†’confirmedв†’fulfilledв†’cancelled` (`lib/orderStatus.ts`, ONE source: roster badge + detail buttons + server-validate). 'cancelled' frees reserved stock. NO CHECK exists on `orders.status` (live-only table) в†’ enum is a proposal в†’ **R-STATUS ratification owed**.
- **AC-3:** every CRUD query is `business_id`-scoped + verifies the order belongs to the business. `[TRACE:ROSTER]`/`[TRACE:PRICE]`/`[TRACE:DELIVERY]` on the gate refusals + re-reservation + recompute.

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David, after merge в†’ Vercel READY):** roster names every order (no "Unknown plant") в†’ click a card в†’ drill-in shows all lines + all services в†’ edit a quantity в†’ total recomputes + the lot re-reserves в†’ remove a line в†’ its lot frees в†’ delete an order в†’ reservations release в†’ move status off pending в†’ a STAFF session cannot edit (controls absent AND server 403). `[TRACE:ROSTER]` stays ON until owner-proven. **Two open decisions logged:** R-QBSTALE (should an edited order auto-re-sync its QB invoice, or is the surfaced banner enough?) + R-STATUS (ratify the status enum + whether cancel should auto-release, which it currently does). **Follow-up (honest debt):** existing MANAGER member rows need a role re-save (or `seed-role-floor` re-run + re-apply) to hold `manage_orders`; owners unaffected.

### 2026-07-08 вЂ” THUNDER CHECKOUT FIX-PASS (4 owner-prove-surfaced fixes): search lookup + centered modal + conditional required address/phone + owner delivery-date вЂ” BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; ONE gated migration (delivery_date), ZERO new api-fn

**Type:** App code вЂ” 1 shared fn (`searchStockLines` in `packages/shared/src/inventory/stockLineResolver.ts` + barrel) + 6 cultivar files (ScanOrder, QrScanner, CustomerCapture, CartReview, useCart, useSubmitOrder) + `api/orders/submit.ts` (rides the existing insert вЂ” 12/12 held) + ONE GATED migration `20260708_orders_delivery_date.sql` (David applies). `[TRACE:RESOLVE]`/`[TRACE:DELIVERY]` ON. `npm run verify` **exit 0 zero NET-NEW** (tsc 6 / eslint 250 / knip 10В·14В·15 == baseline); `build:cultivar` clean 2338 modules; `submit.ts` esbuild-bundles OK. **UNCOMMITTED вЂ” David commits** (harness rule). STORY-CITED **MAPS-TO 2.1** (in-store purchase workflow, `user_stories.md` #231; as-built recon В§1b/В§4/В§7; flow spec В§2 line 55 "requires `delivery_date` column (not yet written)"). These are the four checkout gaps the #97/#98 owner-prove surfaced вЂ” fixes, not new design.

**FIX 1 вЂ” SEARCH lookup, not exact-match (`ScanOrder` manual field):** NEW shared `searchStockLines(supabase, businessId, term, {columns,limit})` вЂ” PARTIAL match: term is a case-insensitive substring of `sku`/`name` OR a token-subset of the name (`nameTokenSet`), business_id-scoped (AC-3), agnostic (AC-1), capped 25, name-sorted. `QrScanner` gained an optional `onLookup` prop вЂ” when wired (ScanOrder only) the manual "Look up"в†’"**Search**" field routes to search (partial "vitex"/"shoal"/"SCV" в†’ matching lot(s)); a **camera scan still resolves EXACTLY** via `resolveStockLine` (a QR carries the whole slug), and **InventoryCount is untouched** (it omits `onLookup` в†’ keeps exact-count behavior вЂ” a count SHOULD be exact). ScanOrder: 0 matches в†’ unknown sheet; 1 в†’ openReview; >1 в†’ the SAME pick list the size-collision uses. The picker was **generalized** `SizeChoice`в†’`PickChoice {inventoryId,title,sub,row}` (one shape, one UI) serving both size-collision (title=size, sub=qty) and search-multi (title=`name В· size`, sub=`sku В· qty В· $price`); button relaid to a column so long names read. `[TRACE:RESOLVE] manual search {term, matchCount}`.

**FIX 2 вЂ” center the checkout modal (`ScanOrder`):** `S.modal` `alignItems: flex-end`в†’**`center`** + `padding:16`/`boxSizing`; `S.sheet` radius `16px 16px 0 0`в†’**`16`** + `maxHeight:85vh`/`overflowY:auto`. Position only, no behavior change вЂ” the review/picker/unknown sheets now center vertically+horizontally (standing modal convention).

**FIX 3 вЂ” required address + phone when delivery selected (`CustomerCapture`):** reads the requirement FROM the chosen transport service вЂ” `deliveryRequired = !!selectedTransport && (selectedTransport.requires_address || transport_mode==='staff')` (owner-set flag, NOT hardcoded). When true: Address label drops "(optional)"в†’"**Delivery address**" + required, Phone drops "(optional)" + required (10-digit valid), and `hasErrors` blocks submit until both filled; self/non-delivery leaves them optional (unchanged). `[TRACE:DELIVERY]` on the blocked submit. **Scope note (deliberate, per spec):** required set = address_line1 + phone; city/state/zip left optional (full-address-for-routing is a fast-follow, not this pass).

**FIX 4 вЂ” owner/manager delivery-date field (`CustomerCapture` в†’ cart в†’ submit):** a `<input type="date" min=today>` shown ONLY when `deliveryRequired && (isOwner || role==='MANAGER')` вЂ” the MANUAL precursor to the customer-facing scheduling calendar (flow spec В§2; customer self-schedule is the later story). Threaded: `useCart.deliveryDate`/`setDeliveryDate` в†’ `CartReview` (displays "Delivery: <date>" + the address in the summary) в†’ `SubmitPayload.deliveryDate` в†’ `submit.ts`. **`orders.delivery_date` does NOT exist** (live-only orders table, tech-debt #39; flow spec В§2 named it "not yet written") в†’ **GATED migration `20260708_orders_delivery_date.sql`** (`ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS delivery_date date`, nullable/additive, David applies as postgres; verify (A)-(B) embedded). **Deploy-window-safe:** `submit.ts` inserts WITH `delivery_date` and on a missing-column error (42703/PGRST204) **retries WITHOUT it** (`[TRACE:DELIVERY]` fallback) so checkout never breaks before the column lands (mirrors the deliveries/create.ts pattern). The field is wired to write the moment the column exists.

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David, after merge в†’ Vercel READY; migration applied for FIX 4 persistence):** (1) `/orders` в†’ New order в†’ the manual field: type a partial id/name в†’ a pick list в†’ resolves (single match resolves direct); (2) the item/picker/unknown modals appear CENTERED; (3) pick a delivery branch в†’ at customer capture Address + Phone are required (blank blocks submit); a self order leaves them optional; (4) as owner/manager on a delivery order, a delivery date can be entered в†’ shows on review в†’ persists to `orders.delivery_date` (once the migration is applied; before that the order still completes, date dropped, `[TRACE:DELIVERY]` fallback logged). `[TRACE:RESOLVE]`/`[TRACE:DELIVERY]` stay ON until owner-proven. **NEW gap sub-story logged** (`user_stories.md`, NEEDED В§, STATUS needs-input): template-driven service setup so a non-technical owner can't mis-shape a service (the editor is capable but not foolproof).

### 2026-07-08 вЂ” THUNDER SETTINGS SERVICE EDITOR: expose ALL categories (+ transport) + un-conflate `price_type`/`price_unit`, both CREATE and EDIT вЂ” UNBLOCKS #97's demo-data reshape (BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; APP CODE ONLY, ZERO migration, ZERO new api-fn)

**Type:** App code вЂ” `packages/shared/src/pages/Settings.tsx` (service create + edit forms) + 1 NEW generic enum module `packages/shared/src/business-logic/serviceOfferingEnums.ts` (+ barrel export) + docs. **NO schema** (every `service_offerings` column already exists вЂ” verified from `20260529_businesses_f_service_offerings.sql` before building), **NO new `api/` file** (rides the existing insert/update; 12/12 HELD), AC-3 owner-fenced RLS unchanged. `[TRACE:SERVICE]` ON (already present; now logs the un-conflated rule). `npm run verify` **exit 0 zero NET-NEW** вЂ” and the baseline IMPROVED (eslint 251в†’**250**, removed the dead local `CATEGORY_LABEL` const; re-baselined + locked); tsc 6 / knip 10В·14В·15 == baseline; `build:cultivar` clean 2338 modules. **UNCOMMITTED вЂ” David commits** (harness rule). This is the **"separate Settings-editor task" ROW #97 / DECISIONS-INDEX В§4b named** вЂ” it un-blocks the restored transport/netting workflow's demo-data reshape.

**STORY-CITED (MAPS-TO 2.1):** satisfies the in-store purchase-workflow story (`user_stories.md`, ARC delivery) вЂ” specifically its "delivery + planting as two correctly-ruled services" requirement. Flow-spec В§5/В§6 (fulfillment: delivery-only vs delivery-with-planting) + В§8 (config philosophy: opinionated defaults, always configurable, VISIBLE, propagate immediately) read before building. The owner could NOT create/fix those two services today because the editor was incomplete.

**RECON-CONFIRMED GAPS CLOSED (built to the prior Settings-editor recon, not re-reconned):**
- **STEP 1 вЂ” CATEGORY (both forms):** the category dropdown OMITTED `transport` в†’ now the full schema set (transport / addon / maintenance / inspection / subscription) on BOTH the New Service and Edit forms, and **category is now EDITABLE** (Edit couldn't change category в†’ a mis-categorized/fused service could never be fixed; now it can be moved between groups). Option list is sourced from the shared enum module, not an inline list (AC-1 вЂ” generic schema enums; a vertical supplies service ROWS, never enum members).
- **STEP 2 вЂ” UN-CONFLATE `price_type` / `price_unit` (both forms):** the single "per unit / flat fee" control conflated the two DB fields and hardcoded `price_unit='plant'`. Split into TWO owner-set controls вЂ” `price_type` (flat | per_unit) and `price_unit` (order | plant | vehicle | visit); no longer derived. Delivery = flat/order, planting = per_unit/plant, inspection = flat/visit, etc.
- **STEP 3 вЂ” CATEGORY-SCOPED RULE FIELDS surfaced (both forms):** category=transport в†’ `transport_mode` (self | staff) + `requires_address`; category=addon в†’ `trigger_transport_mode` gate ('' = always show). Fields render only for the category they apply to (not a wall of columns), and on save the ones that don't apply are CLEARED вЂ” so a service moved between categories can't carry a stale/mischarging rule.
- **NEW `packages/shared/src/business-logic/serviceOfferingEnums.ts`** вЂ” the ONE generic option-set (CATEGORY/TIMING/PRICE_TYPE/PRICE_UNIT/TRANSPORT_MODE), sourced from the migration column CHECKs so the picker can never offer or omit a rejected value; exported from the business-logic barrel. Reported per the STEP-0 constraint (introduced ONE generic source).

**STANDING RULE encoded (В§8 + D-9 Surface Honesty):** prices are OWNER-SET and always editable; the editor invents no number; every field stays editable after seed.

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David, after merge в†’ Vercel READY):** create a NEW transport service (transport / flat / per order) в†’ it appears in the Transport group; edit the fused demo row's category + price rule в†’ shape **delivery (transport/flat/order) + planting (addon/per_unit/plant)** as two correctly-ruled services entirely in the UI, NO migration в†’ the restored transport workflow (#97, `4f895a9`) lights up fully (branch-1 two-line math + "Delivery only" appearing). `[TRACE:SERVICE]` stays ON until owner-proven.

### 2026-07-08 вЂ” THUNDER RESTORE the transport/netting/decline workflow to the May-18 proven spec + write its canonical spec doc (recovered from git; regressed by the multi-item rewrite) вЂ” BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; ZERO migration, ZERO new api-fn

**Type:** App code (1 NEW `lib/transport.ts` + TransportToggle rewrite + AddOns/CartReview/useCart/useSubmitOrder/`api/orders/submit.ts` edits) + 1 NEW spec doc + DECISIONS-INDEX В§4b + built-inventory + CLOSE-OUT-LEDGER #97. **NO schema, NO new `api/` file** (12/12 held). `[TRACE:CART]`/`[TRACE:PRICE]` ON. `npm run verify` **exit 0 zero NET-NEW** (tsc 6 / eslint 251 / knip 10В·14В·15 == baseline); `build:cultivar` clean; `submit.ts` esbuild-bundles OK. **UNCOMMITTED вЂ” David commits** (harness rule). This is a **RESTORE-TO-SPEC**, not a redesign.

**RECOVERED (git archaeology, cited):** the proven workflow lived in the May-18 "Session 3" arc вЂ” `0897e00` (add-ons screen + transport toggle), `a2bd015` (netting/addon render), `5aeff86` (**NettingPrompt with the TX Transportation Code Ch.725 citation + confirm/decline**), `8764b39` (decline cart-total), `0041769` (**transport/netting decision persisted to order + QB**). Original transport = a single-select 3-radio (`self`/`delivery`/`install`); decline = `useCart.nettingDeclined` в†’ `orders.netting_declined` + `transport_note` (Ch.725 waiver). **What SURVIVED the rewrite (even strengthened):** the decline-capture вЂ” current `submit.ts` writes `orders.netting_declined` AND the immutable `order_compliance_records` (accepted/declined per compliance offering); `CompliancePrompt` (red 3px `#A32D2D` border + configurable Ch.725 copy) intact. **What REGRESSED (`bd02a58` multi-item rewrite):** the transport SHAPE вЂ” the three mutually-exclusive branches collapsed into a *single-select over raw `service_offerings` transport rows*, so **delivery (flat Г—1) + planting (per_unit Г—N) as TWO services could no longer be expressed** (a fused per_unit "We deliver and plant" row вЂ” the seed shape + the drifted demo row `db24be2e` вЂ” charges planting-only, no separate per-order delivery fee, no first-class delivery+planting branch).

**RESTORED (onto the current service_offerings model):**
- **NEW `packages/cultivar-os/src/lib/transport.ts`** (pure) вЂ” `resolveTransportRoles` classifies transport rows into ROLES by SHAPE (self=`transport_mode:self` / delivery=staffВ·flat/order / planting=staffВ·per_unit/plant) в†’ `availableChoices` + `choiceToSelection` build the **three-branch radio**: (1) **Delivery + planting** = delivery (flat Г—1) + planting (per_unit Г—N); (2) **Delivery only** = delivery (flat Г—1); (3) **No thank you (self)** = no transport charge + netting offer. **D-9 Surface Honesty FLAG:** when the two correctly-ruled rows aren't BOTH present it surfaces the problem (UI note + `[TRACE:CART]` flag) and best-efforts on what exists (fused per-plant row runs branch-1 as one Г—N line, "Delivery only" unavailable) вЂ” **never silently mischarges**. It does NOT hand-migrate data; the reshape is the separate Settings-editor task.
- **`TransportToggle.tsx`** rewritten to the three-branch radio (price hints composed from the same rows the charge uses в†’ no drift). **`useCart.ts`** вЂ” branch-driven `setTransportChoice` + `plantingOffering`/`plantingSelected` state + `setPlantingSelected`. **`AddOns.tsx`** вЂ” resolves roles, sets the initial branch (pre_selected=self в†’ the Regina/netting default), renders the branch radio + the netting `CompliancePrompt` (self only) + a separate planting summary line. **`CartReview.tsx`** вЂ” delivery + planting rendered as two adjustable lines (each netted, qty-editable, removable). **`useSubmitOrder.ts` + `api/orders/submit.ts`** вЂ” planting threaded + charged (per_unit Г—N) + written as its OWN `order_service_selections` row (branch 1 в†’ TWO service rows); `deriveTransportMethod` returns `install` when planting is attached; `[TRACE:PRICE]` on the netting decision/decline write.
- The per-branch attach math reuses the ONE shared `lib/netting.ts` engine (`nettedQuantity` per_unitв†’Г—N / flatв†’Г—1) for BOTH display and charge (В§6 rule 8). Canonical spec: **`docs/specs/SPEC-transport-netting-decline-workflow-2026-07-08.md`** (indexed at DECISIONS-INDEX В§4b) вЂ” the artifact that stops this workflow being re-derived.

**PROVEN (pure-fn harness):** correctly-ruled two-row shape в†’ B1 delivery **Г—1 $50** + planting **Г—5 $1125** (5 trees в†’ 1 delivery + 5 planting), B2 delivery Г—1 no planting, B3 self no charge; fused/drifted shape в†’ FLAG raised + "Delivery only" unavailable + single per_unit line Г—5 $1125 with planting null (**no double-count**). AC-1 (Ch.725 copy lives in the row's `compliance_title`/`compliance_body`, not code) В· AC-3 (business_id-scoped + business-scoped decline rows) В· 12/12 held.

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David, after merge в†’ Vercel READY):** run all three branches вЂ” (1) delivery+planting on 5 trees в†’ **1 delivery + 5 planting**, math correct; (2) delivery only в†’ 1 delivery, no planting; (3) no-thanks в†’ tarp offered, decline в†’ **Ch.725 message + a decline row registered** (`order_compliance_records` + `orders.netting_declined`). **Branch-1's two-line math owner-proves once the demo's fused row is split into a delivery (flat/order) + planting (per_unit/plant) row via the Settings offerings editor** (the separate task вЂ” this build FLAGs the fused shape, doesn't hand-migrate it). `[TRACE:CART]`/`[TRACE:PRICE]` stay ON until owner-proven.

### 2026-07-08 вЂ” THUNDER two owner-prove-surfaced bugs on the Item-1/2 + multi-item arc: profile cost-leak (Bug 1) + QBO-absent checkout crash (Bug 2) (BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; one merge covers multi-item + both bugs)

**Type:** App code (4 files) + docs. **NO schema, NO new `api/` file** (12/12 held). `[TRACE:PRICE]`/`[TRACE:CHECKOUT]` ON. `npm run verify` **exit 0 zero NET-NEW** (tsc 6 / eslint 251 / knip 10В·14В·15 == baseline); `build:cultivar` clean. **UNCOMMITTED вЂ” David commits** (harness rule). Both surfaced during the Item-1/2 owner-prove; they gate the multi-item owner-prove.

**BUG 1 вЂ” profile "Plant price" showed `unit_cost` (COST) on a customer-facing page = a cost-wall leak (D-9).** The Add-to-cart button was repointed to `sell_price` at Item 1, but the profile HEADLINE was the missed site. **Verify-first grep of every customer-facing render:** the leak was **`PlantHero.tsx:24,84`** (`inv?.unit_cost` в†’ "Plant price", rendered by `/plant/<sku>`); `PlantCard.tsx:34` also displayed `unit_cost` but is an **orphan (no consumers)** вЂ” repointed anyway for hygiene. All cart/checkout sites (PlantProfile Add-to-cart, AddOns, CartReview, Confirmation, ScanOrder) already read `sell_price`. **FIX:** `PlantHero` reads `sell_price` (label "Price"); on null/0 shows an honest **"Not set"** вЂ” does NOT fall back to `unit_cost`, does NOT show $0 (same treatment as the cart's $0-refusal). `unit_cost` stays ONLY on owner cost surfaces (BusinessInventory/CostToProduce/Dashboard view_costs-gated/server). `[TRACE:PRICE]` on the profile read.

**BUG 2 вЂ” checkout blanked when QuickBooks not connected (same `.find()`-on-undefined family as the Confirmation fix in the multi-item build).** **RECON (R1вЂ“R3):** R1 вЂ” the deployed crash was `Confirmation` (old) `addons.find(вЂ¦)` where `addons` was destructured from `useCart()` but **never existed on the store** в†’ `undefined.find` в†’ blank; on a QBO 503 that path still ran. **Already removed by the multi-item Confirmation rewrite** (reads `items[]`+nav-state, no `.find`); the only `.find` left in the path is `services.find` on the always-defined cart array. R2 вЂ” Confirmation does NOT assume an invoice object (reads `qbStatus`/`qbInvoiceId` from nav-state; 503 в†’ `pending`/undefined в†’ amber "invoice will sync" badge + pay-path copy); `useSubmitOrder` already treats `!qbRes.ok`+throws as non-blocking. R3 вЂ” **pay-at-office ALSO fires the QBO call** (both buttons в†’ `handleSubmit` в†’ `submit()` always POSTs `/api/qbo/invoice/cultivar`). **FIX (hardening + instrumentation, since the crash itself was already gone):** `useSubmitOrder` QBO-failure branches (`!qbRes.ok` + `catch`) now emit `[TRACE:CHECKOUT]` "degraded gracefully, did NOT throw" (order stands, `qbStatus` stays `pending`, invoice-to-follow); `Confirmation` emits `[TRACE:CHECKOUT]` when it renders the QB-absent state вЂ” a QB invoice object is never required to confirm. Both pay paths complete to a real "order confirmed" with QB disconnected.

**вљ пёЏ DESIGN FLAG for David (R3, surfaced not decided):** pay-at-office currently creates a QuickBooks invoice (the QBO call fires on BOTH pay paths). Reasonable (you still want the invoice in QB for an in-office payment) but worth a deliberate call вЂ” should pay-at-office skip QBO, or keep it? Made crash-proof regardless; behavior otherwise unchanged.

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David, after the one merge в†’ Vercel READY):** (1) `/plant/<sku>` shows **"Price"** = the sell_price (e.g. $124), NOT unit_cost ($24), and an unpriced lot shows "Not set" not $0; (2) full checkout completes to a real confirmation (order #, pay-at-office / invoice-to-follow) вЂ” **no blank** вЂ” on BOTH pay paths with QuickBooks DISCONNECTED; `[TRACE:CHECKOUT]` shows the degraded branch fired without throwing. `[TRACE:PRICE]`/`[TRACE:CHECKOUT]` stay ON until owner-proven. **One merge covers multi-item + both bugs.**

### 2026-07-08 вЂ” THUNDER MULTI-ITEM SCAN-LOOP CART + ATTACH-RULE NETTING + INTERACTIVE REVIEW (recon R1вЂ“R5 в†’ build; BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; ZERO migration, ZERO new Vercel fn)

**Type:** App code (12 files edited + 4 NEW) вЂ” the order flow went single-itemв†’multi-item. **NO schema** (the per-order/per-plant attach rule already lived on `service_offerings.price_type`/`price_unit` вЂ” recon R1вЂ“R5), **NO new `api/` file** (the order write rides the existing `submit.ts`; 12/12 held). `[TRACE:CART]` ON; `[TRACE:RESOLVE]`/`[TRACE:PRICE]` stay ON. `npm run verify` **exit 0 zero NET-NEW** вЂ” and the baseline IMPROVED (tsc 10в†’6 from a Confirmation bug-fix, eslint 252в†’251; re-baselined + locked). `build:cultivar` clean (2336 modules); `submit.ts` esbuild-bundles OK (now imports the shared netting lib). **UNCOMMITTED вЂ” David commits** (harness rule). **GROUNDED IN (not re-litigated):** the multi-item recon (R1вЂ“R5, this session) вЂ” R1 found the cart was single-item to the core (`useCart.item` + all 4 tail pages + `submit.ts`); R1вЂ“R5 found the attach rule already exists on `service_offerings` (no migration), the scanner+resolver are reusable, and the interactive review is net-new UI. D-34 (per-line anchor), Item-1/D-35 (sell_price server-authoritative, $0 refused, no cost leak), D-9/Regina (surface-not-silent), AC-3, В§6.8 (reuse-not-fork). The fertilizer quantity-bearing-with-spec class is **DEFERRED** (its own recon + a small additive migration) вЂ” seam left untouched, NO spec column added.

**BUILT:**
- **`useCart` `item`в†’`items[]`** вЂ” `setItem` (single-line replace = the proven N=1 profile path), `addLine` (merge-by-anchor for the scan loop вЂ” re-scanning a lot bumps its qty), `setLineQty`/`removeLine`. Anchor = `plant.stock_line_id ?? plant.id`.
- **NEW `lib/netting.ts` (pure attach-rule engine):** `totalPlantCount`, `nettedQuantity` (per_unitв†’Г—plantCount, flatв†’Г—1 вЂ” the collapse-vs-scale `submit.ts` already ran, generalized to the cart), `lineSubtotal`, `isNettingOffering`. **CartReview display + `submit.ts` charge + the email import the SAME rule** (В§6.8 вЂ” cannot drift).
- **NEW `pages/ScanOrder.tsx` (`/checkout/scan`, private, `qr_checkout`-gated):** reuses `QrScanner` + `resolveStockLine`(STOCK_LINE_COLUMNS) + `synthesizePlant` from walk-and-count в†’ scanв†’resolveв†’**Add / Pass** loop (scanв†’add / scanв†’pass / scanв†’add, size-picker on a multi-size collision, "not recognized" keeps scanning) в†’ builds `items[]` в†’ "Review order в†’" hands to the proven tail. Reached via a **"New order"** button on `/orders`.
- **Tail threaded `items[]`:** `AddOns` (line list + services netted over plant count) В· `CustomerCapture` В· **`CartReview` rewritten to the INTERACTIVE proposal (D-9/Regina):** each plant line qty-editable + removable, each service shows its rule (`per plant В· Г—N` / `per order В· Г—1`) with qty steppers + include/remove toggles, live totals вЂ” the owner ADJUSTS the netted itemization before submit, nothing silently applied В· `Confirmation` (threaded + **fixed a pre-existing latent bug**: it read `transport`/`addons` off the cart вЂ” fields that never existed on the store в†’ `addons.find` at :66 would throw; now reads `items[]` + nav-state).
- **`submit.ts` loops the lines:** ONE `order_items` row per line, each on the exact proven **D-34 anchor branch** (stock line в†’ `business_inventory_id`, plant_id null; specimen в†’ `plant_id` вЂ” one line = one anchor); server-authoritative `sell_price` per line; $0-refusal per line names the item; services written with the owner-confirmed netted quantities (`serviceQuantities` override в†’ else the rule).
- **Extractions (В§6.8, no drifted copy):** `synthesizePlant`+`anchorKey` в†’ `lib/stockLinePlant.ts` (usePlant repointed) В· `extractTag` в†’ `lib/scanTag.ts` (InventoryCount repointed). verify-universals cap #r exception added for `/checkout/scan`+`/checkout/addons`.

**NETTING WORKED EXAMPLE (the demo target):** a 5-tree order вЂ” "We deliver and plant" (per_unit/plant $225) scales Г—5 = $1,125; travel netting (per_unit/plant $10) Г—5 = $50; a per-order/flat delivery collapses Г—1. All shown in CartReview with their rule + adjustable before submit.

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David, after merge-to-main в†’ Vercel READY):** open `/orders` в†’ **"New order"** в†’ scan multiple plants (scanв†’add / scanв†’pass / scanв†’add) в†’ "Review order" в†’ AddOns/Customer в†’ **CartReview PROPOSES the netted itemization** (delivery/planting Г—N or Г—1 per rule) в†’ adjust one line's qty (or a service) в†’ submit в†’ the order writes **N `order_items` rows, each anchored correctly** (stock line or specimen), totals reflect the netting; a single-item order from a plant profile still works unchanged (N=1); an unpriced line is refused at review + server. `[TRACE:CART]` stays ON until owner-proven.

**BANKED FOLLOW-UP (not built):** the fertilizer quantity-bearing-with-spec suggestion/sizing engine (per-plant service carrying a spec like "30gal") вЂ” its own recon-first pass + a small additive `order_service_selections` migration.

New return fields `sizeChoices`/`chooseSize`/`resolvedVia`.

- **plant.ts** вЂ” new `stock_line_id?: string | null` discriminator (set = synthesized from a stock line, its value is the `business_inventory.id`).
- **submit.ts (STEP 5)** вЂ” branches on `plant.stock_line_id`: stock line в†’ server-reads `business_inventory(sell_price, size)` directly + writes `order_items.business_inventory_id` (plant_id null) + leakage container from `size`; specimen в†’ the existing `cultivar_plants` join + `plant_id`. **ONE line = ONE anchor, never both.** `$0/NULL refusal` + tier-hold (AC-4) + tamper-defense all preserved. `[TRACE:RESOLVE]` on the anchor lane + order_items anchor.

A true-anon customer scan of a discovery lot still falls to "not found" вЂ” a separate RLS decision, out of scope.

### 2026-07-07 вЂ” THUNDER SELL_PRICE (D-35, inventoryв†’sale spec Item 1 of 4): stored sell_price + cart repoint + $0-refusal (BUILDER-COMPLETE, M1 GATED, owner-proof owed; STEP-5 tier math STOPPED вЂ” AC-4)

Fail loud, not silent.

Until then checkout charges the stored sell_price at baseline (honest вЂ” no faked discount).

### 2026-07-06 вЂ” THUNDER AGNOSTIC MEMBER/DEVICE CONSOLE (D-31 spine) + role-source-split FIXED at root + nav-integrity guard (BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; UNCOMMITTED вЂ” David commits)

**Type:** App code + shared component + ONE service-key DATA seed (run live) + verify-script guard. **NO schema migration** (fix is DML into an existing table вЂ” the STOP-for-migration condition did NOT fire), **NO invite-backend rewrite** (reused verbatim), **ZERO new Vercel functions** (12/12 held). `[TRACE:MEMBERCONSOLE]` ON. `npm run verify` exit 0 zero NET-NEW (eslint 262в†’**253**, re-baselined); `build:cultivar` + `build:ignition` clean. **UNCOMMITTED** вЂ” commit msg at `/tmp/member-console-commit-msg.txt` (`git commit -F` then push).

**ROOT CAUSE (found via LIVE query, not guessed вЂ” recon overturned the "two-table drift" premise):** `business_members.role` was ALWAYS the single source and ALWAYS correct (live: test obrien=`STAFF`, all owners=`OWNER`); invite (`createInvitation`) AND `/roles` (`getMembersByBusiness`) both already read it. The `/roles` dropdowns rendered empty because **`role_definitions` had 0 rows live** вЂ” the role CATALOG (OWNER/MANAGER/STAFF floor) was never populated (the `20260623` migration created the table/policies but its floor-seed INSERT never landed on project bgobkjcopcxusjsetfob). Empty catalog в†’ `resolveRoles()`=[] в†’ `<select>` had zero `<option>`s в†’ every member's correct stored role had nothing to match. A **missing-catalog** bug, not a member-role drift.

**FIX (the split, closed):** (1) **seeded the floor** вЂ” `scripts/seed-role-floor.mjs` (idempotent, service-key, DML; RLS `rd_owner_write` forbids owner sessions writing the `business_id IS NULL` anchors в†’ service-key is the only path, per the migration's own comment). Sets mirror `roles.ts` DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS (OWNER 13 / MANAGER 10 / STAFF 3) so invite + catalog cannot drift. **RAN LIVE, readback PASS.** Reversible: `--clear`. (2) **resilient dropdown** вЂ” the console member-role `<select>` always surfaces the member's stored role even if absent from the catalog (Surface Honesty; never silently drops a real role again).

**BUILT вЂ” ONE agnostic console (D-31 spine, both verticals mount):** `packages/shared/src/components/team/MemberConsole.tsx` вЂ” prop-driven (supabase, businessId, isOwner, can, theme, permissionGroups, inviteRoleOptions, defaultPermissionsFor), **ZERO Cultivar/Ignition imports**. Tabs: **Users** (invite via proven `createInvitation` в†’ link/copy; member list PRESELECTED per-member role `<select>` в†’ `updateMemberRole`; pending в†’ `revokeInvitation`; remove) В· **Roles** (chips from injected catalog; save/clone/factoryReset/delete/add-custom via `upsertTenantRole`/`deleteTenantRole` вЂ” clone-not-mutate, floor never mutated) В· **Devices** (REAL вЂ” `member_devices` live, owner `md_owner_all` RLS: lock-out/re-enable/delete via new shared `listDevicesByBusiness`/`setDeviceActive`/`deleteDevice`). Cultivar wrapper `pages/TeamConsole.tsx` at **`/team`** (manage_settings-gated) supplies forest-green theme + tileRegistry chip catalog (`registryPermissions()`, ONE source).

**CONSOLIDATION:** NAV_IA `nav_roles`в†’**`nav_team`** (/team, "Team & Roles", Admin); `/roles` в†’ `<Navigate to="/team">`; `RoleConfig.tsx` **DELETED** (superseded by the Roles tab); Settings "Manage roles в†’" repointed to `/team`; AdminIndex card key updated. **KNOWN follow-up (honest debt):** the `/settings/all` Team tab still hosts a working invite (proven flow, left intact вЂ” slim to a pointer next pass). Ignition `IgnitionAdmin.jsx` READ-only reference, untouched.

### 2026-06-30 вЂ” THUNDER stress battery (RECON) в†’ CASE 5 hardening: dup-size SURFACED at populate WRITE time (OPTION A; BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; ledger #74)

**Type:** RECON (adversarial schema stress battery on `business_inventory`, read/throwaway-marker only, nothing persisted вЂ” baseline restored to clean 111) в†’ then APP CODE ONLY (no schema, no migration, no PAT). `npm run verify` exit 0 zero NET-NEW (tsc 10 / eslint 266 / knip 10В·14В·15). **Uncommitted вЂ” David commits** (harness rule: commit only when asked).

**STRESS BATTERY (6 adversarial cases, all run live + reloaded to clean 111 between):** the identity model (name + `variant_group` + `size`) + the `detectSizeCollision` picker rule HOLD on all 6. Cases 1вЂ“2 (populate over existing / idempotency) HOLD вЂ” populate is a full per-business DISC- REPLACE (`clearDiscovery` wipes all `DISC-%` first в†’ idempotent by construction; single parent в†’ 4 size rows, never doubled). Case 3 (cross-grower same-name) HOLDS вЂ” the resolve query is explicitly `.eq('business_id')` scoped в†’ no cross-tenant size leak (note: the fence is the app-level filter, not RLS alone, since service-key/admin paths bypass RLS). Case 4 (null `variant_group`) + Case 6 (vocabulary clash `7 Gallon` vs `2" cal`) HOLD. **Case 5 (duplicate size in a group) = the one soft-spot:** two rows sharing one `variant_group` + the SAME `size` в†’ `detectSizeCollision`'s all-distinct check fails в†’ silent UNKNOWN, indistinguishable from a never-seen item.

**CASE 5 HARDENING вЂ” OPTION A (catch at populate, surface in the report):** chose A as the demo-safety minimum (no schema). New pure exported **`findDuplicateSizeGroups(rows)`** in `packages/shared/src/discovery/populate.ts` runs after row-expansion, before insert; on a `(variant_group, size)` collision it emits `[TRACE:POPULATE] data-quality:dup-size` + adds `PopulateResult.dataQuality.dupSizeGroups` + `raw_extract.counts.dupSizeGroups` (audit trail) + the `api/discovery/ingest.ts` `action=populate` response. **`detectSizeCollision` UNTOUCHED** вЂ” refuse-to-guess stays correct; we DETECT + SURFACE, never dedupe/auto-pick (both rows still written). `populate.test.ts` **9/9** new; catalog regressions 31+35 green; ingest bundles.

**RECON facts (reported):** NO uniqueness constraint on `(business_id, variant_group, size)` (only the non-unique `business_inventory_variant_group_idx`); the count-loop UNKNOWN is pure-silent (ambiguous-collision at `InventoryCount.tsx:319` is a dev-only `console.warn`, then falls into the SAME `setPhase('unknown')` as never-seen at `:324`).

**OWNER-PROVE owed (David):** run a populate that produces a dup (or a seeded dup) в†’ the populate report/run output shows `dupSizeGroups в‰Ґ 1` with the colliding `(variant_group, size)` в†’ fix the dup before counting. **Deferred to David (CASE 5 options):** **B** вЂ” count-time: distinguish "dup data-quality" UNKNOWN from "never-seen" UNKNOWN in `InventoryCount.tsx` (runtime net; touches the demo-critical count path в†’ fast-follow, not pre-demo). **C** вЂ” DB unique constraint on `(business_id, variant_group, size)` (migration; hard-rejects the write вЂ” may be too hard a stop for messy imports в†’ real schema decision, STOP-and-ask). `[TRACE:POPULATE]` stays ON.

### 2026-06-30 вЂ” THUNDER COUNT-SIDE SIZE-PICKER (L5 NEED_CLARIFICATION seam): same-name multi-size scan в†’ size-picker в†’ per-size row, resolves the size-variant LANDMINE at the count side (BUILDER-COMPLETE, phone owner-proof owed; ledger #72)

**Type:** APP CODE ONLY вЂ” 1 file `packages/cultivar-os/src/pages/InventoryCount.tsx` + 1 reversible test seed `scripts/seed-size-variants.mjs`. **NO schema / NO migration / NO PAT** вЂ” the size-variant migration `20260628` is already APPLIED + verified (`size`/`variant_group` live on `business_inventory`, nullable, EMPTY) в†’ **schema-verification gate N/A this pass** (confirmed back at STEP 0). `[TRACE:*]` STAYS ON; `[TRACE:COUNT]`+`[TRACE:RESOLVE]` extended. `npm run verify` exit 0 zero NET-NEW (tsc 10 / eslint 266 / knip 10В·14В·15); `build:cultivar` clean. Commit `1a9726b`.

**WHAT (the gating next-build from #70's LANDMINE, now built):** the count-side size-picker fills the **L5 NEED_CLARIFICATION** seam the L4 `:263` comment already reserved. Before: a same-name multi-size scan (the size-variant catalog model вЂ” ONE `business_inventory` row per varietyГ—size, siblings sharing `variant_group`, differing by `size`) token-matched >1 row at L4 в†’ collapsed to AMBIGUOUSв†’UNKNOWN, which would have **regressed the OWNER-PROVEN grower-resolve (#61, Vitexв†’DISC-1105в†’count-45)** the moment per-size rows were populated. Now: such a scan surfaces a **SIZE-PICKER** в†’ David picks the size в†’ the existing `openReview`в†’qtyв†’save path SETS that exact per-size row's `qty`.

**THREE-LENS RECON (binding gate, reported before building):** HAVE вЂ” `handleScan` ladder L1 tag_id в†’ L2 sku в†’ L4 token-set equality (`:242-269`) в†’ UNKNOWN; the `matches.length > 1` branch (`:263-268`) was the reserved seam (comment named it). NEED вЂ” detect a same-name size collision in that branch, present the sizes, route the chosen row through `openReview`. WANT вЂ” a first-class `'picker'` phase reusing the file's modal/sheet-per-outcome pattern + a pure helper + seam filled in-place. OPTIONS A (inline in the unknown sheet, cheapest вЂ” rejected: conflates "no match" with "too many matches") в†’ **B (dedicated phase, recommended + built)**. Recon confirmed the settled design; no schema change needed.

**BUILT (Option B):**
- **`detectSizeCollision(matches)`** (pure, module-level) вЂ” fires ONLY when: >1 match, all share ONE non-null `variant_group`, AND each carries a DISTINCT non-empty `size`. Any mixed/empty group or dup/missing size в†’ false в†’ UNKNOWN as today (surface-don't-presume).
- **L4 SELECT gained only `size, variant_group`** (`InvRow` typed). On collision в†’ build sorted `SizeCandidate[]` (numeric size sort, on-hand shown) в†’ new **`'picker'` phase**. `pickSize(c)` в†’ `openReview(c.resolved)` в†’ existing qtyв†’save sets THAT per-size row.

### 2026-06-26 вЂ” THUNDER Story Board system: `user_stories.md` + `stories.html` (pure renderer) вЂ” second lens beside the Status Board (BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; ledger #56)

**Type:** TWO standalone root files (beside `status.html` / `TRACE-SESSION-BOOTSTRAP.md`). **NO app code, NO schema, NO migration, NO `[TRACE:*]`** в†’ schema-verification gate N/A. `npm run verify` exit 0 zero NET-NEW (standalone root files don't trip the gate, like `status.html`). Commit `29487f1`.

**THE TWO BOARDS, ONE SYSTEM:** **`status.html` = what's BUILT** (capabilities, green/amber/red в†ђ `TRACE-SESSION-BOOTSTRAP.md`). **`stories.html` = what we're BUILDING TOWARD** (day-in-the-life user need в†ђ `user_stories.md`). They LINK by **capability id (`MAPS-TO`) + arc**, so a reader sees which capabilities have a story (vs build-blind) and which stories have no built pieces yet (gaps).

**FILE 1 вЂ” `user_stories.md` (living source of truth):** format header explaining the tags, all **8 `## ARC:` sections** (front-door В· ocr-doc-routing В· cost-to-produce В· suggestion В· delivery В· discovery В· identity-roles-sec В· asset-inventory-pmi) + `## ARCHIVED`. Each story = `### title` + `STATUS:` (active/in-build/archived) В· `ARC:` В· `MAPS-TO:` (status-board cap id(s), `вЂ”`=gap) В· `PIECES:` + markdown narrative. **Seeded** with David's draft inventory/OCR stories using ONLY the provided metadata + narratives grounded in handoff facts (ledger #54, board 2.3), flagged `_(David to expand)_` вЂ” no invented scenarios.

**FILE 2 вЂ” `stories.html` (PURE RENDERER, NEVER edited):** mirrors `status.html` вЂ” file-picker + drag-drop + auto-fetch + view tabs + empty state + matching styling; a tiny inline block-markdown renderer (works on `file://`, no CDN). Parses the tag format, groups by canonical 8-arc order, renders each story as a card: STATUS pill (in-build amber / active blue / archived muted), prominent `в†’ <cap id>` MAPS-TO badge (red `в†’ no capability yet` on a gap), monospace PIECE chips, narrative. **Active** (active+in-build) В· **All** В· **Archived** toggle (default Active); tally computed from parsed data, never hardcoded. **One-source discipline:** add stories to the `.md`, re-open the page вЂ” zero HTML edits.

**PROVEN:** parser node-extracted vs the live `.md` в†’ 4 stories parse with correct arc/status/maps/pieces; the format-example inside the blockquote correctly does NOT leak as a story.

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David):** open `stories.html` в†’ pick `user_stories.md` в†’ see the inventory stories by arc with their `в†’ 2.3`/`в†’ 4.2` badges + piece chips в†’ toggle the three views в†’ add a story to the `.md` and re-open to confirm it appears with no HTML edit.

### 2026-06-26 вЂ” THUNDER WALK-AND-COUNT inventory loop (cap 2.3): scan в†’ resolve в†’ qty в†’ save в†’ next в†’ complete вЂ” RECONCILE DEFERRED (BUILDER-COMPLETE, owner-proof owed; ledger #54)

**Type:** App code (2 new + 2 edited cultivar files) + 1 NEW dep (`jsqr`) + ONE GATED migration (WRITTEN, NOT applied) + docs. **NO auth, NO RLS on existing tables, NO schema change on existing tables** в†’ schema-verification gate runs AFTER David applies the new migration. `[TRACE:*]` STAYS ON; new `[TRACE:COUNT]` emits ON. Only `qrcode` GENERATION (`qr/generate.ts` в†’ `${baseUrl}/plant/${id}`) + OS-camera scan-to-PROFILE-via-URL (`/plant/:tagId`в†’`PlantProfile`; `usePlant` resolves `cultivar_plants ilike tag_id` + `business_inventory` FK join). NO in-app decoder anywhere (no jsqr/zxing/BarcodeDetector). The URL-strip + in-app resolve is net-new.
- **GATE 2 (on-hand):** `business_inventory.qty int` IS the on-hand (directly updatable via the existing owner/member RLS). NO count-event / session / on_hand / adjustment notion exists anywhere в†’ a durable count record needs a new table.

**BUILT:**
- **`components/inventory/QrScanner.tsx` (NEW)** вЂ” live `getUserMedia`+`jsQR` decode loop; `extractTag()` strips `/plant/<tag>` (keeps the tag), NEVER navigates; fires `onScan` once per physical scan (pauses on decode). Always-present manual tag-entry fallback so the loop never dead-ends. **Standard-by-value (В§6 r10):** chose jsqr over the web-standard `BarcodeDetector` because iOS Safari (our target вЂ” Lauren on a phone) doesn't support it вЂ” divergence recorded.
- **`pages/InventoryCount.tsx` (NEW, `/inventory/count`, under the existing `view_costs` route gate)** вЂ” state machine idleв†’scanningв†’reviewing/unknownв†’done. Resolve order: `cultivar_plants.tag_id` в†’ `business_inventory.sku` fallback в†’ UNKNOWN. Saveв†’Next **SETS `business_inventory.qty`** for the resolved lot AND records the count. UNKNOWN branch = quick variety/size entry OR skip-&-flag (doesn't stall the loop, doesn't auto-create inventory). Complete ends the session + shows a summary.
- **`/inventory` "Start count" button** + router route. `[TRACE:COUNT]` on session-start / scan-decode / resolve / save / unknown / complete.

**RECORD MODEL вЂ” GATED MIGRATION, HANDED TO DAVID (NOT applied by Thunder):** `supabase/migrations/20260626_inventory_count_sessions.sql` вЂ” `inventory_count_sessions` + `inventory_counts` (durable per-item record reconciliation will read: counted_qty, item_label, inventory_id, plant_tag_id, was_unknown, session, timestamp). RLS owner_all + `is_active_member` member_all (AC-2/AC-3); CASCADE on session/business, SET NULL on inventory_id. **Deploy-window safe:** tables absent в†’ on-hand still updates, count-record skipped with a loud `[TRACE:COUNT]` warning (mirrors the deliveries `service_type` fallback). Verification queries (A)вЂ“(E) embedded in the migration footer.

**RECONCILIATION (counted-vs-expected, sold/dead/missing) NOT BUILT** вЂ” per instruction. The `inventory_counts` record model is shaped so reconciliation can read it later; room left, nothing built.

**OWNER-PROVEN owed (David):** (1) apply `20260626_inventory_count_sessions.sql` as `postgres` в†’ mint short-lived PAT в†’ catalog-verify (A)вЂ“(E) в†’ revoke PAT; (2) on a phone: Start count в†’ scan a real test plant QR (URL stripped, item shown e.g. "Shoal Creek Vitex, 30 gal") в†’ enter qty в†’ Saveв†’Next reopens the camera в†’ an unrecognized scan is handled gracefully в†’ Complete saves the session; confirm `business_inventory.qty` updated + an `inventory_counts` row per item; `[TRACE:COUNT]` trail visible. `[TRACE:COUNT]` stays ON until owner-proven.

### 2026-06-24 вЂ” THUNDER Standing build gates: ESLint + knip (baseline-and-ratchet) + semantic-dup rule (BUILDER-COMPLETE, fail-on-new PROVEN)

**Type:** Build tooling ONLY вЂ” 5 new files + package.json/lock + CLAUDE.md rules/handoff + 2 ledgers. **NO app logic / RLS / schema / phone-fix touched** в†’ schema-verification gate N/A. `[TRACE:*]` STAYS ON. Tooling commit **`73d82a0`** (pushed). Installs the two standing gates from Lightning's prompt; deliberately NOT installing jscpd/Prettier/npm-audit/test-suite (separate value-review).

**GATE 1 вЂ” ESLint (flat config, `eslint.config.mjs`).** typescript-eslint + react-hooks, scoped to bug CLASSES we've actually hit, NOT style: `no-unused-vars` (dead vars вЂ” the class that hid the dead R2 phone branch), `no-unreachable` (dead code), **`no-floating-promises` + `no-misused-promises`** (TYPE-AWARE вЂ” the swallowed upsert/await errors we just spent hours on; 136 live hits prove typed linting is active), `react-hooks/rules-of-hooks` + `exhaustive-deps` (stale closures). **`no-explicit-any` DELIBERATELY OFF** вЂ” type-hygiene, not a bug class; leaving it on buried the real signal under ~200 `any` hits (baseline would've been 464, dishonest). Type-aware rules scoped to the active TS `src` dirs with tsconfigs (cultivar-os/shared/trace-app); api/ + scripts/ get the non-typed rules (no project resolution needed). Added `packages/shared/tsconfig.json` (lint-only вЂ” NOT wired into any build tsc, so the tsc baseline stays the 8 cultivar + 2 trace-app errors).

**GATE 2 вЂ” knip (`knip.json`).** Dead files + unused exports/types. Scoped to the MAINTAINED surface: cultivar-os + trace-app get accurate detection; **`shared` is treated as all-entry** (it's a deep-import library consumed by api/ via relative `../../../shared/src/...` paths knip can't trace across the workspace boundary в†’ file-level claims there are false positives в†’ suppressed to keep the ratchet trustworthy); **ignition-os/assessment/coolrunnings ignored** (frozen donor / empty). Root `scripts/**` declared entries (they're CLI tools, not dead) + `*.test.*` declared entries (run by a test runner). Baseline knip found **10 genuine orphan files** (NurseryProvider/useNursery/useAuth/etc. вЂ” legacy pre-business_members auth) + 14 unused exports + 15 unused types, all real.

**BASELINE-AND-RATCHET (`quality-baseline.json` + `scripts/quality-gate.mjs`).** Recorded debt: **tsc 10 В· eslint 267 В· knip 10 files / 14 exports / 15 types**. `npm run verify` = quality-gate (tsc + eslint + knip vs baseline) + verify-universals; **fails on NET-NEW only** (any metric above baseline), never blocks on pre-existing debt. When a metric drops it tells you to `npm run quality:baseline` to lock the lower number in. New scripts: `lint`, `knip`, `quality:gate`, `quality:baseline`, `verify`.

**PROVEN (both directions):** `npm run verify` exit 0 at baseline (gate PASSED + universals PASSED). Introduced a probe file (unused var + floating promise) в†’ eslint 267в†’269 + knip files 10в†’11, both marked `NEW!`, **gate exit 1**. Removed probe в†’ back to green, exit 0. Fail-on-new works.

**CLAUDE.md STANDING RULES added** (В§6 rules 8вЂ“9 + В§9 gate 11): (8) **semantic-dup check** вЂ” before writing logic, check if the same OPERATION exists elsewhere even if code differs (rule of three); catches drifted-equivalent logic scripts can't (the 3 phone writers в†’ `normalizePhone`). (9/11) **quality gate** вЂ” every build runs `npm run verify`; BUILDER-COMPLETE = zero NET-NEW; baseline shrinks never grows.

**NOTE (memory):** the gate runs ~99s and peaks ~1.5GB (typed linting + knip each build a TS program). Fine standalone; run `quality:gate` and `verify:universals` separately if memory-constrained.
